meta.title: AI Dev 25 | Sharon Zhou & Mahdi Ghodsi: Run Deepseek Reasoning and Finetuning on AMD GPUs w/ Lamini
meta.description:
In this workshop, Sharon Zhou (CEO & Founder, Lamini) and Mahdi Ghodsi (AI Solution Architect, AMD) demonstrate how to run DeepSeek-style reasoning apps on AMD MI300 GPUs and fine-tune open LLMs using Lamini Memory Tuning.

You'll see how to transform an open model—like Llama 3 (8B)—into a Mixture of Experts, and how to build a fast, efficient Text-to-SQL agent with high accuracy.

This session offers practical insights into scalable model deployment and customization using open-source tools and accessible hardware.

Keep building,
DeepLearning.AI
